title: The Mountain
flavor: The original mountain of competitive Rocket League: Season 1 champion, early superstar and one of the first true faces of the esport.

title: Pinch God
flavor: Season 2 World Champion, Worlds MVP and one of the names that defined early high-level mechanics before the modern meta existed.

title: Four Times World Champion
flavor: Four RLCS World Championships across eras, regions and rosters. The strongest pure winning résumé in Rocket League.

title: Three Times World Champion
flavor: The finishing edge of the Gale Force, Dignitas and Vitality championship eras, with three World Championships and years of elite LAN pressure.

title: Perfect Spring
flavor: Three regionals, the Spring Major and the World Championship in the same debut run. One of the cleanest peaks in RLCS history.

title: BDS Anchor
flavor: A defining player of the open era, built on pressure, structure, efficiency and championship-level defensive control.

title: Four Times Major Champion
flavor: One of the most complete LAN players of the open era, with elite defensive reads, repeated Major peaks and a résumé that keeps growing.

title: 1v1 GOAT
flavor: A legacy card for Fairy Peak!'s long-standing control, 1v1 dominance and importance to the Vitality identity.

title: NA Captain
flavor: A career legacy card for one of the defining names of North American Rocket League, from the early RLCS era through modern competition.

title: Dignitas Brain
flavor: The cerebral core of the Gale Force and Dignitas dynasty, remembered for structure, passing lanes and championship composure.

title: OG Ceiling Shot
flavor: A famous early ceiling shot that became a marker for where Rocket League mechanics were heading.

title: This Is Rocket League
flavor: Season 5 Grand Final. Zero seconds on the clock, the ball still live, and one of the most famous calls in esports history.

title: Moisty Hat-Trick
flavor: FURIA vs Moist at the 2021-22 World Championship. A defining SAM moment on the world stage.

title: Moist Masterclass
flavor: A Joyo moment card for the 2022 Spring Major run, focused on mechanics, confidence and attacking creativity.

title: Mr. Physics
flavor: A mechanics-first zen card based on his physics-defying touches, reads and solo-pressure moments.

title: Ceiling Redirect
flavor: A community-favorite redirect highlight. Kept as a stylish mechanics card without inflating it into the top tier.

title: OG Air Dribble
flavor: A Season 1-era air dribble highlight from iBUYPOWER Cosmic, preserved as one of the original mechanical moment cards.

title: Chronic Didn't Jump
flavor: A modern NA mechanics card built around Daniel's solo-pressure aura and one of the most quoted Gen.G/G2-era moments.

title: Zen Winstreak Killer
flavor: A 1v1-flavored moment card for rw9 ending the sense of inevitability around zen's run and showing elite defensive control.

title: Be Careful!
flavor: A Fairy Peak! control card built around the classic warning: give him space and the play is already gone.

title: Double Tap King
flavor: A card for the early double-tap and backboard era, when Deevo helped move pro mechanics forward.

title: Wasteland Shot
flavor: An early GarrettG highlight card, representing his long-running ability to produce memorable goals under pressure.

title: Cloud9 Mechanics
flavor: The mechanics-forward piece of Cloud9's Season 6 identity, built for speed, creativity and pressure.

title: Ice Cold
flavor: A clutch card for rise's reputation in tense series, especially during Moist's explosive LAN era.

title: Valencia Peak
flavor: A DreamHack Valencia peak card for one of the most memorable non-RLCS LAN performances of the pre-open era.

title: Gamers8 Champion
flavor: FURIA's Gamers8 2022 win was one of the biggest international statements by a Brazilian Rocket League roster.

title: Season 1 World MVP
flavor: Season 1 World Championship MVP. A substitute story that became part of the early RLCS mythology.

title: Season 2 World MVP
flavor: Season 2 World Championship MVP with FlipSid3 Tactics.

title: Season 3 World MVP
flavor: Season 3 World Championship MVP. A card focused on early aerial creativity and backboard pressure.

title: Season 4 World MVP
flavor: Season 4 World Championship MVP with Gale Force Esports.

title: Season 5 World MVP
flavor: Season 5 World Championship MVP in one of the most famous Grand Finals in RLCS history.

title: Season 6 World MVP
flavor: Season 6 World Championship MVP. Cloud9 had the mechanics, but Torment gave the run its defensive base.

title: Season 7 World MVP
flavor: Season 7 World Championship MVP with Renault Vitality.

title: Season 8 World MVP
flavor: Season 8 World Championship MVP. The NRG title completed the four-time story.

title: 2021-22 World MVP
flavor: World Championship MVP after joining Team BDS and turning a great roster into a champion.

title: 2022-23 World MVP
flavor: The World Championship MVP card for the season where zen completed the perfect debut run.

title: 2024 World MVP
flavor: World Championship MVP card for Team BDS's 2024 title run, replacing the incorrect dralii MVP entry from the previous base.

title: 2025 Season MVP
flavor: Season MVP card for NRG's 2025 title season, separated from the Worlds MVP category to avoid a false award label.

title: Stockholm Major MVP
flavor: RLCS 2021-22 Fall Major MVP with Team BDS.

title: LA Winter Major MVP
flavor: RLCS 2021-22 Winter Major MVP with G2 Esports.

title: London Spring Major MVP
flavor: RLCS 2021-22 Spring Major MVP. The official MVP version of the Moist/Joyo LAN peak.

title: Rotterdam Major MVP
flavor: RLCS 2022-23 Fall Major MVP with Gen.G Mobil1 Racing.

title: San Diego Winter Major MVP
flavor: RLCS 2022-23 Winter Major MVP with Karmine Corp, reinforcing Vatira's Major résumé.

title: Boston Spring Major MVP
flavor: RLCS 2022-23 Spring Major MVP. The Major that confirmed Vitality's perfect split was real.

title: Copenhagen Major MVP
flavor: RLCS 2024 Major 1 MVP with Gentle Mates Alpine, correcting the previous Itachi MVP entry.

title: London Major MVP
flavor: RLCS 2024 Major 2 MVP with G2 Stride.

title: Birmingham Major MVP
flavor: RLCS 2025 Birmingham Major MVP with Karmine Corp.

title: Raleigh Major MVP
flavor: RLCS 2025 Raleigh Major MVP. Falcons' win gave MENA its first RLCS Major title.

title: Boston Major MVP
flavor: RLCS 2026 Boston Major MVP with Gentle Mates Alpine.

title: Paris Major MVP
flavor: RLCS 2026 Paris Major MVP with Karmine Corp in front of the French crowd.

title: NA MVP
flavor: A high-peak North American card for Firstkiller's individual pressure, speed and ability to reshape entire series.

title: Rogue Era
flavor: A card for the early Firstkiller period, when his individual mechanics made Rogue a must-watch roster.

title: Endpoint Breakout
flavor: Before the Worlds MVP card, there was the Endpoint breakout: a rookie star changing the pace of EU series.

title: MENA Arrival
flavor: A Falcons/Sandrock-era card for MENA becoming a real international contender.

title: Falcons Finalist
flavor: A second trk511 card for Falcons' continued international relevance and deep LAN runs.

title: MENA Aerial Engine
flavor: An Ahmad card for the Sandrock/Falcons mechanical engine that helped introduce MENA's speed to the wider RLCS audience.

title: 50/50 King
flavor: A control-heavy card for oKhaliD's grounded style, 1v1 discipline and impossible-looking challenges.

title: First 1v1 World Champion
flavor: The first official 1v1 world champion card, built around peak solo mechanics and fearless pressure.

title: Mechanical Prodigy
flavor: A mechanics-first card for Joreuz's prodigy reputation and peak individual creativity.

title: OCE Longevity
flavor: A long-career OCE card. Stronger than his base card, but intentionally below the global superstar tier.

title: OCE Captain
flavor: A lower-overall special card for leadership, region identity, desk presence and long-term OCE relevance.

title: OCE Breakthrough
flavor: A card for the first OCE era that showed the region could create LAN threats and individual stars.

title: SAM Pioneer
flavor: A Brazilian/SAM legacy card for the players who helped build the region before its deeper international runs.

title: FURIA Engine
flavor: A FURIA support-engine card for the roster identity around pressure, pace and Brazilian confidence.

title: Vitality Slayer
flavor: A SAM upset card for Lostt's ability to threaten elite European teams with pace and finishing.

title: SAM Wall
flavor: A defensive SAM card for controlled challenges, last-man saves and structure under pressure.

title: Wildcard Upset
flavor: A lower-tier special card for the APAC/OCE upset energy that makes international Swiss stages unpredictable.

title: Third Man Blueprint
flavor: A classic NA structure card for the third-man discipline that shaped early NRG and pre-open era team play.

title: BDS Glue
flavor: A BDS structure card for the stabilizing player who made pressure, spacing and rotations feel inevitable.

title: Vitality Finisher
flavor: A Vitality attacking card for Alpha54's finishing, speed and ability to convert pressure into goals.

title: Perfect Vitality
flavor: A role-player card for Vitality's perfect 2023 run, rewarding adaptability and team fit around zen and Alpha54.

title: Gentle Mates Structure
flavor: A corrected Itachi card: not Copenhagen MVP, but still a structure-heavy LAN champion piece for Gentle Mates.

title: Liquid Mechanics
flavor: A Team Liquid mechanics card for Atow.'s speed, reads and ability to generate pressure from awkward positions.

title: NRG Precision
flavor: A 2025 NRG title-era card for Atomic's reliable finishing and clean offensive decisions, without falsely labeling him as Worlds MVP.

title: Moroccan World Champion
flavor: A special champion card for dralii's 2024 BDS run and mechanical ceiling, separated from the corrected 2024 World MVP award.

title: Perfect Vitality
flavor: Vitality's 2023 perfect run gives Ferra the premium coach card.

title: Gamers8 FURIA
flavor: FURIA's Gamers8 2022 title was a landmark for Brazilian Rocket League. STL gets a coach card for that run.

title: NA Superteam
flavor: A coach card for managing elite NA rosters and keeping high-talent lineups stable.

title: BDS Reset
flavor: A BDS Worlds preparation card focused on structure, mental reset and bracket adaptation.

title: Madrid NRG
flavor: NRG's Season 8 title run earns Sizz a mentality-focused coach card.

title: Karmine Structure
flavor: A Karmine Corp structure card built around controlling elite attacking talent.

title: Gentle Mates
flavor: A fundamentals-focused coach card for Gentle Mates' LAN structure.

title: Vitality Blueprint
flavor: A coach/analyst legacy card for the early Vitality structure and one of the most recognizable strategic voices in Rocket League.

title: Rocket Draft Creator

effect.description: +5 to every team attribute — the creator's touch.

flavor: A hidden tribute: LiberatoRL and Wings E-Sports, from the early days of South American Rocket League. The one who built this game gets a single card — and it lifts the whole team.
